meta.title: NurseAda – Mai Taimakon Lafiya 24/7
meta.description: Taimakon lafiya na AI don Najeriya da Afirka. Binciken alamomi, magunguna, da jagorar lafiya cikin harshensa.

home.tagline: Kula da lafiya, yadda kake so
home.subtitle: Mai taimakon lafiya na AI 24/7 don Najeriya da Afirka. Binciken alamomi, magunguna, da tallafi cikin harshenka.

chat.title: Yi hira da NurseAda
chat.emptyState: Bayyana alamomin rashin lafiyarka, tambaya game da magunguna, ko nemi jagorar lafiya. Idan gaggawa ce, kira 112 ko je asibiti nan take.
chat.placeholder: Bayyana alamominka ko yi tambayar lafiya...
chat.serverError: Ban iya isa ga server ba. Ka tabbatar cewa gateway yana aiki kuma URL a cikin .env.local daidai ne.
chat.guestMode: Yanayin baƙo — shiga don ganin bayanan majinyaci
chat.promptFever: Ina da zazzaɓi kuma ina jin gajiya
chat.promptDrugCombo: Zan iya shan paracetamol da ibuprofen tare?
chat.promptDka: Ina da ketones kuma sugarena ya tashi
chat.promptHerbalNausea: Akwai maganin gargajiya don tashin zuciya?
chat.promptJointPain: Magani na dabi'a don ciwon gaɓoɓi
chat.promptPregnancy: Ganyen shuwaka yana da aminci ga mai ciki?
chat.attachSubtitle: Zaɓi inda hoton likitanci zai fito
chat.photoPermission: Don Allah ka ba da damar shiga hotunanka don haɗa hoton likitanci.
chat.cameraPermission: Don Allah ka ba da damar kyamara don ɗaukar hoton alamomi ko scan.

remedies.title: Magungunan Gargajiya
remedies.subtitle: Zaɓuɓɓukan da ke da shaidar kimiyya don cututtuka na yau da kullum
remedies.searchPlaceholder: Nemo magani, cuta, ko kayan haɗi...
remedies.noResults: Babu maganin da ya dace da bincikenka. Gwada wani kalma.
remedies.disclaimer: Waɗannan zaɓuɓɓuka ne na ƙarawa, ba don maye gurbin maganin asibiti ba. Kullum ka gaya wa likitanka game da duk wani maganin gargajiya da kake amfani da shi, musamman idan kana shan magunguna. Idan gaggawa ce, je asibiti nan take.

medications.title: Magunguna
medications.subtitle: Sarrafa tunatarwar magani da bincika mu'amalar magunguna
medications.signInReminders: Shiga don ƙirƙira da sarrafa tunatarwar magani.
medications.noReminders: Ba ka da tunatarwar magani tukuna.
medications.noRemindersHint: Ƙara ɗaya don kar ka manta da maganinka.
medications.interactionLabel: Shigar da magunguna don bincika mu'amala
medications.noInteractions: Babu wata matsalar mu'amala da aka samu tsakanin waɗannan magunguna.
medications.minTwoDrugs: Shigar da aƙalla magunguna biyu don bincika mu'amala.
medications.disclaimer: Wannan bayani ne kawai na gaba ɗaya, ba shawarar likita ba ne. Kullum ka tabbatar da bayanan magani da mu'amala tare da mai sayar da magani ko likitanka. Ka nemi likita don ganewar cuta da magani. Idan gaggawa ce, je asibiti nan take.

appointments.title: Alƙawari
appointments.subtitle: Nemo asibitoci da sarrafa alƙawuranka
appointments.signInAppointments: Shiga don ganin da sarrafa alƙawuranka.
appointments.noAppointmentsHint: Nemo asibiti ka yi alƙawarin farkonta.
appointments.noClinics: Babu asibiti da ya dace da abin da ka zaɓa.
appointments.reasonPlaceholder: Bayyana ɗan gajeren dalilin da kake son ganin likita
appointments.disclaimer: Neman alƙawari don tsarin lokaci ne kawai, ba ziyarar likita ba ne. Ka tabbatar da samuwa kai tsaye tare da asibitin. Wannan bayani ne na gaba ɗaya kawai, ba shawarar likita ba. Ka nemi likita don ganewar cuta da magani. Idan gaggawa ce, je asibiti nan take ko kira 112.

auth.signInSubtitle: Shiga don amfani da NurseAda mai taimakon lafiyarka
auth.signUpSubtitle: Yi rajista don ajiye hirarraki da ganin bayanan majinyaci
auth.passwordsMismatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba.
auth.passwordTooShort: Kalmar sirri dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 6.
auth.confirmationSent: Mun aika da hanyar tabbatarwa zuwa <bold>{email}</bold>. Danna hanyar don kunna asusunka, sa'annan ka shiga.
auth.signUpDisclaimer: Da ƙirƙirar asusu ka yarda cewa NurseAda tana ba da bayanan lafiya na gaba ɗaya kawai, ba shawarar likita ba. Kullum ka tuntuɓi mai kula da lafiya.

patient.title: Bayanan Majinyaci
patient.noObservations: Babu binciken da aka samu don wannan majinyaci.
patient.noMedications: Babu maganin da aka samu don wannan majinyaci.
patient.noReports: Babu rahoton da aka samu don wannan majinyaci.
